word: G3840 - πάντοθεν - pántothen - pan-toth'-en - On every side

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: On every side
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adverb / வினையடை
from all sides, from every quarter
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Adverb (of source) from G3956; from (that is, on) all sides: - on every side, round about.
